arts.sum: England manager Thomas Tuchel confirms that he will reach out to Arsenal's Ben White to see if the defender is willing to end his national team exile.

arts.ttl: Arsenal eye La Liga chief as Edu replacement in 2025
arts.sum: Arsenal are ready to cast their net wide to source a replacement for former sporting director Edu in 2025. The Premier League giants were left shocked by the Brazilian’s decision to step away from his role at the Emirates Stadium in November with immediate effect. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta drops clear Arsenal January transfer window hint amid Viktor Gyokeres link
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta has downplayed speculation that the title-chasing north Londoners will be making any big moves in the January transfer window from when it opens on New Year's Day. Sporting CP sensation Viktor Gyokeres has been linked with Arsenal - after matching the Gunners' search criteria this summer.
